title: ClutchLoot
description: The plugin is made by fredthedoggy and is very simple if u Clutch u get op loot
body: The plugin is made by fredthedoggy and is very simple if u clutch u get op loot,this plugin sees if u fall of 10 blocks or higher and take no fall damage to give the loot,the loot can be protection 10 netherite or diamond armor,totem of undyings,power 10 and unbreaking 10 bows and tridents and other op stuff.idk what more to say,try it for urself and find out more https://discord.gg/fredthedoggy-s-development-826850346311352321
